$comment: Design token file for the Accordion component
$description: A collapsible panel component. The header row contains optional artwork (icon or custom slot), a title with optional inline Tag and info icon, an optional subtitle, and a chevron toggle. When expanded, a Custom Slot content area is revealed below the header. Supports two states (Collapsed, Expanded), two artwork types (Icon, Custom), and a disabled state.

background.description: White background for the accordion container

default.description: Mobile icon neutral moderate stroke color - gray/600 - #475467

disabled.description: Mobile icon neutral subtle stroke color - gray/300 - #d0d5dd

size.description: 37px square for the custom artwork placeholder (non-standard size, matches Figma spec)

background.description: Mobile accordion custom artwork background - neutral/200 - #eaecf0

border-radius.description: 8px rounded corners on the custom artwork container

typography.description: 11px Medium, 16px line-height — placeholder label inside the custom artwork slot

color.description: Mobile accordion custom artwork label color - gray/600 - #475467

default.description: Mobile accordion title text color - gray/700 - #344054

disabled.description: Mobile accordion title text color - gray/300 - #d0d5dd

size.description: 18px — info-circle icon displayed inline next to the title

name.description: GHL icon name for the optional informational icon

typography.description: 12px Regular, 17px line-height — secondary line below the title

default.description: Mobile accordion subtitle text color - gray/600 - #475467

disabled.description: Mobile accordion subtitle text color - gray/300 - #d0d5dd

collapsed.description: GHL icon name shown when the accordion is collapsed

expanded.description: GHL icon name shown when the accordion is expanded

default.description: Mobile accordion chevron icon color - gray/700 - #344054

disabled.description: Mobile accordion chevron icon color - gray/300 - #d0d5dd

height.description: Hairline divider shown below the header row (collapsed) and below content (expanded)
